sourceTitle: Guidelines for the use of AI in teaching at EPFL
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The use of AI-generated content in assignments without proper attribution is considered AI plagiarism. Tools that specifically aim to detect whether content was AI-generated (e.g., turnitin ) are not admissible as stand-alone evidence of AI plagiarism due to their high risk of false positives
